name: Marvin Gardens Real Estate & Property Mgmt
hours: Mon-Thu 9:30-5:30, Fri CLOSED, Sat 10-2, Sun CLOSED
painPoints: 7 people managing 130 properties — lean operation, likely strained
Closed Fridays entirely — unusual gap for property management
No visible online scheduling — contact form only for bookings
Tenant/vendor coordination likely manual and time-consuming
strengths: Founded Up the Ladder Scholarship — down payment assistance for families
Supports affordable housing vouchers (10% of portfolio)
Partners with HOPE, OUR Center, The Inn Between
Dave is from Buffalo NY, University of Rochester grad (Music + History)
Lives on a small farm with wife, 3 dogs, chickens, 2 mules, and a three-legged cat
conversationStarters: Heard about the Up the Ladder Scholarship — that's a really cool community program
Managing 130 properties with a small team is impressive
suggestedApproach: Highest dollar opportunity. Maintenance request automation, after-hours tenant call handling, vendor coordination workflow. Dave is community-minded — lead with genuine interest in his work, not a hard pitch. Ask about the biggest time sink in managing 130 properties.
